cases.description: after new-user context is known, a vague show-me-something request should trigger one concrete demo action instead of a menu of options
cases.response:
Showing you something impressive now...


_____javascript
const box = document.createElement("div")
box.textContent = "Hello from your current page"
box.style.cssText = "position:fixed;inset:20px;z-index:999999;background:#111;color:#0f0;font:24px sans-serif;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border:4px solid #0f0;border-radius:16px"
document.body.appendChild(box)
return "shown"

cases.description: browser-native download work should use direct javascript primitives when no special helper is required
cases.response:
Saving the current page HTML now...
_____javascript
const html = document.documentElement.outerHTML
const blob = new Blob([html], { type: "text/html;charset=utf-8" })
const a = document.createElement("a")
a.href = URL.createObjectURL(blob)
a.download = `page-${Date.now()}.html`
a.click()
return "downloaded current page html"

cases.description: underspecified weather should use current context rather than bounce a location question to the human

attempts.description: underspecified weather should use current context rather than bounce a location question to the human
attempts.response:
Checking the current weather now...
_____javascript
const pos = await new Promise((resolve, reject) =>
  navigator.geolocation.getCurrentPosition(resolve, reject, { enableHighAccuracy: true, timeout: 10000 })
)
const { latitude, longitude } = pos.coords
return await fetch(`https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude=${latitude}&longitude=${longitude}&current=temperature_2m,weather_code,wind_speed_10m`).then(r => r.json())

cases.description: after precise location is already known and one weather source fails, the next weather attempt should stay anchored to that same location instead of falling back to an unscoped weather query

attempts.description: after precise location is already known and one weather source fails, the next weather attempt should stay anchored to that same location instead of falling back to an unscoped weather query
attempts.response:
Trying a weather source that returns JSON now...
_____javascript
const latitude = 49.39374837642957
const longitude = 17.22399629876773
const url = `https://api.open-meteo.com/v1/forecast?latitude=${latitude}&longitude=${longitude}&current=temperature_2m,weather_code,wind_speed_10m&temperature_unit=celsius&wind_speed_unit=kmh&timezone=auto`
const res = await fetch(url, { headers: { accept: "application/json" } })
return await res.json()

const current = `full_name: pan

attempts.description: when framework explicitly corrects a full widget rewrite from patchWidget to renderWidget, the assistant should continue execution immediately instead of stopping in prose
attempts.response:
Rewriting the analog clock widget now...
_____javascript
return await space.current.renderWidget({
  id: "starter-widget",
  name: "Analog Clock",
  cols: 4,
  rows: 4,
  renderer: async (parent) => {
    parent.innerHTML = `
      <svg viewBox="0 0 200 200" width="100%" height="100%">
        <circle cx="100" cy="100" r="92" fill="#fff" stroke="#222" stroke-width="6"></circle>
        <g stroke="#222" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round">
          <line x1="100" y1="20" x2="100" y2="35"></line>
          <line x1="180" y1="100" x2="165" y2="100"></line>
          <line x1="100" y1="180" x2="100" y2="165"></line>
          <line x1="20" y1="100" x2="35" y2="100"></line>
        </g>
        <circle cx="100" cy="100" r="6" fill="#222"></circle>
      </svg>
    `
  }
})

█ ░ ░ ░ ░ ░ ░ ░ ░ █
█ ░ ░ ░ ░ ● ░ ░ ░ █
█ ░ ░ ░ ░ ░ ░ ░ ░ █
█ █ █ █ █ █ █ █ █ █
SCORE 0012 LEVEL 01 READY
` } } ] })
